$comment: Canonical source-of-truth for sprk_analysisaction row SYS-LOOKUP-MEMBERSHIP (ActionType 52). Per R4 FR-1 (spec line 109-110) — deploys the missing Action row for the C# LookupUserMembershipNodeExecutor that shipped in R3 (platform-foundations-r3 task 041). Deploy via mcp__dataverse__create_record / mcp__dataverse__update_record (upsert pattern per spec line 343). The C# executor consumes PlaybookNodeDto.ConfigJson at runtime — sprk_systemprompt is here in JPS format for catalog discoverability + playbook designer documentation, NOT for LLM rendering (this is a system data-ops action, not an AI analysis action; sprk_temperature = 0 + sprk_executoractiontype = 52 ensures no AiAnalysis dispatch).

fields.sprk_description: System primitive that resolves the executing user's record memberships for a given Dataverse entity type via MembershipResolverService (in-process, per ADR-034). Binds resolved ID set to the node's OutputVariable for downstream consumption by QueryDataverseNodeExecutor or similar filters. Used by notification-* playbooks to scope queries to 'records the user is involved with' (owner / assignedAttorney / assignedParalegal / custom roles).

instruction.role: System data-ops primitive (ActionType 52 = LookupUserMembership). Not invoked against an LLM — the BFF resolves this via LookupUserMembershipNodeExecutor calling IMembershipResolverService.ResolveAsync in-process per FR-1B.1 of platform-foundations-r3.
instruction.task: Resolve the executing user's record memberships for a given Dataverse entity type. Return a deduplicated + sorted ID set bound to the node's OutputVariable, plus per-role attribution under byRole.
constraints: MUST be run in a per-user scheduling context (NodeExecutionContext.UserId is required, non-empty Guid)
MUST NOT be invoked against an LLM — sprk_executoractiontype = 52 routes execution to the C# node executor, not to AiAnalysisNodeExecutor
MUST resolve via IMembershipResolverService.ResolveAsync (in-process), NOT via HTTP round-trip to /api/users/me/memberships/{entityType}
Output ids list MUST be de-duplicated + suitable for downstream consumption via {{joinIds <outputVar>.ids}}
instruction.context: This action is the canonical replacement for the broken non-existent team-member junction FetchXml join discovered in R3 FR-1C.1 / A1 defect. Per ADR-034 (User-record Membership Resolution Pattern), MembershipResolverService is the single primitive every playbook MUST use when filtering Dataverse records by 'records the user is involved with'.

entityType.description: Dataverse entity logical name to resolve memberships against (e.g., 'sprk_matter', 'sprk_document', 'sprk_task'). Forwarded to MembershipResolverService.ResolveAsync as the entityType parameter.

roles.description: Optional role filter (case-insensitive). Empty/null means 'all discovered roles for the entity'. Typical values for sprk_matter: ['owner', 'assignedAttorney', 'assignedParalegal']. Pass-through to MembershipResolveOptions.Roles.

identityTypes.description: Optional identity-type filter forwarded to MembershipResolveOptions.IdentityTypes. Empty/null means 'all'. NOTE: LookupUserMembershipNodeConfig in BFF does not currently expose this field — to use it, extend the config record (see src/server/api/Sprk.Bff.Api/Services/Ai/Nodes/LookupUserMembershipNodeExecutor.cs LookupUserMembershipNodeConfig). Documented here for forward compatibility + designer discoverability.

includeRelated.description: Phase 1D transitive-expansion flag. Q3 owner clarification: 1-hop max. When true, the resolver is asked to include related-entity memberships (currently accepted-but-ignored — platform-foundations-r3 task 054 implements). When true, executor passes sentinel ['*'] to MembershipResolveOptions.IncludeRelated.

limit.description: Maximum number of memberships to return. Defaults to MembershipResolveOptions.DefaultLimit (500). Capped at MembershipResolveOptions.MaxLimit by the resolver. NOTE: LookupUserMembershipNodeConfig in BFF does not currently expose this field — documented here for forward compatibility.

fields.name: entityType
fields.description: Echo of the input entity logical name (e.g., 'sprk_matter').

fields.name: count
fields.description: Number of distinct memberships resolved (length of ids array).

fields.name: ids
fields.description: De-duplicated + sorted list of Dataverse record IDs the executing user is a member of (for the given entityType, after role/identityType filtering). Consumed downstream via {{joinIds <outputVar>.ids}} in QueryDataverseNodeExecutor FetchXml templates.

fields.name: byRole
fields.description: Per-role attribution map { roleName: [ids] }. Allows downstream nodes that need per-role grouping to use the StructuredData/template-engine surface.

fields.name: continuationToken
fields.description: Opaque continuation token for paged retrieval (null when no more results). Currently always null in Phase 1A — task 054 implements paging.

fields.name: cacheExpiresAt
fields.description: When the cached resolver response expires (ISO 8601 UTC). Allows downstream nodes / dashboards to surface freshness.

metadata.author: spaarke-daily-update-service-r4 task 005
metadata.description: System data-ops primitive: resolves user-record memberships via MembershipResolverService. Canonical action backing the in-process path for ActionType 52. Deployed by R4 task 005 to close the platform-foundations-r3 deployment gap (executor shipped, Action row missing).
